name: mirror
description: Mirror / reflect the active object across a plane. plane is one of "xy", "yz", "xz". TR: 'aynala/yansit/simetrigini al' = mirror, 'xy/yz/xz duzlemi' = plane. EN: 'mirror/reflect across the .. plane'.
examples: mirror the object across the xy plane -> {"command":"mirror","params":{"plane":"xy"}}

params.name: plane
params.note: mirror plane: xy, yz or xz
